ruleset.name: Lazy Init Plugin Rules
ruleset.description: Build-breaking PMD rules for maintainability issues we want to catch locally.

rule.name: OneBreakOrContinuePerLoop
rule.message: Loops should not contain more than a single break or continue statement.
rule.description: Implements Sonar rule java:S135 by reporting loops that contain more than one break or continue statement for that loop. Nested loops and switch statements are ignored so only the control flow of the current loop is counted.

property.name: xpath
